product: L-Acoustics Soka (on-wall ultra-shallow Colinear Source). Closely related sibling: Soka inWall (separate product entry).

electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 60 Hz - 20 kHz (preset-dependent: [Soka_60] 60 Hz-20 kHz, [Soka] 100 Hz-20 kHz, [Soka_200] 200 Hz-20 kHz), usable bandwidth -10 dB
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4. Per preset with LA4X/LA7.16i/LA12X (or LA2Xi bridge mode): 124 dB [Soka_60], 130 dB [Soka], 133 dB [Soka_200]. With LA2Xi (standard): 124/128/130 dB respectively.
electroacoustic.directivity: 140 degrees horizontal x nominal vertical +5/-21 degrees (>2 kHz); marketed as 140 x 26 degrees H x V
electroacoustic.components: LF: 9 x 3.5 inch neodymium cone drivers (closed enclosure); HF: 3 x 1 inch neodymium compression drivers on conical/DOSC waveguide with L-Fins, arranged in J-shaped colinear array

amplification.per_amplifier_note: Max enclosures per controller: LA2Xi 1/output, 4 total (SE) or 2 total (BTL/bridge); LA4X 2/output, 8 total; LA7.16i 1/output, 16 total; LA12X 3/output, 12 total. LA2Xi yields reduced max SPL/drive capacity.
amplification.preset_note: Sub-coupling presets pair Soka with SB6i/SB10i: e.g. [SOKA_200]+[SB6_200]/[SB10_200] for closely coupled, [SOKA]+[SB6_100]/[SB10_100] for coupled, [SOKA_60]+[SB6_60]/[SB10_60] for separated. Pre-alignment delays apply (e.g. Soka 1.4 ms with [SOKA]+[SB6_100]); refer to Preset Guide.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection, IN +/- and LINK marked, supplied with connector sealing plate (two cable glands for 2.5 mm2 cables)
connection.breakouts: Optional SPCON 2-point speakON-to-bare-wire adaptor (2.5 mm2, ferruled) replaces the sealing plate; SPCON is only compatible with VBAR and POLE rigging accessories. Custom 2-point speakON-to-bare-wire cable also supported.

physical.dimensions_mm: 1064 H x 99 W x 104.2 D (datasheet: 1065 mm height)
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426C or pure white RAL 9010 (custom RAL on special order)

rigging_accessories: VBAR (vertical rigging bar with seven pickup points and cable pass-through)
deployment.rigging_inserts_note: 6x M6 inserts for external rigging and safety. This OM covers on-wall Soka only; in-wall configurations use the Soka inWall (Sokar) manual.
deployment.secondary_safety: L-Acoustics recommends secondary safety / safety straps at all times; Soundvision used for mechanical and acoustical modeling.

usage: Ultra-shallow (about 104 mm deep), slim on-wall line source for premium installs where the box must visually disappear: lounges, hotels, museums, lecture halls, houses of worship, and residential or commercial spaces.

Each enclosure needs one passive amp channel. Pack density per controller: up to 16 on an LA7.16i, 12 on an LA12X, 8 on an LA4X, and 4 on an LA2Xi (2 in bridge/BTL mode) - the LA7.16i is the most channel-efficient choice for large install counts.

Pick the preset to trade bandwidth for output: [Soka_60] reaches down to 60 Hz at 124 dB for full-range standalone use, while [Soka] (130 dB) and [Soka_200] (133 dB) restrict the low end to 100/200 Hz for higher SPL or sub-coupled designs.

Pair with SB6i or SB10i subwoofers using matched preset sets and the published pre-alignment delays; closely coupled rigs use the [SOKA_200]/[SB_200] family, separated rigs use the [SOKA_60]/[SB_60] family.
Wide 140-degree horizontal by tight ~26-degree vertical pattern makes it well suited as a main system in reverberant rooms or as a discreet surround, keeping energy off ceilings and floors.

Connection is a sealed 4-point push-in terminal block (2.5 mm2 cable through glands); use SPCON only with VBAR or POLE mounts. IP55 rating and color-matchable finish allow weather-exposed and outdoor placements.
